meaning: adj.令人恐惧的,引起突然惊恐的
examples: It was a very frightening experience and they were very courageous.
They are equally fumy and frightening, but they are also aspirational.
In fact, it is frightening to think that this big Swiss bank could face criminal charges.
In the debate he came over as polished, more than competent and not at all frightening.
